school.name: Upstairs Christian Academy
school.description: We provide exceptional education that nurtures both academic excellence and spiritual growth
school.tagline: Nurturing minds, building character, and inspiring excellence through quality Christian education

whyChoose.title: Academic Excellence
whyChoose.description: Our rigorous curriculum and dedicated teachers ensure students achieve their highest potential with consistently high test scores.

whyChoose.title: Technology Focused
whyChoose.description: Modern computer labs, smart classrooms, and digital learning tools prepare students for the future.

whyChoose.title: Character Development
whyChoose.description: We focus on building strong moral values and character through Christian principles and community service.

whyChoose.title: Small Class Sizes
whyChoose.description: Our low student-to-teacher ratio ensures personalized attention and better learning outcomes for every student.

whyChoose.title: Holistic Education
whyChoose.description: We develop the whole child through academics, arts, athletics, and spiritual growth programs.

whyChoose.title: Global Perspective
whyChoose.description: Our international programs and diverse community prepare students for success in a global society.

facilities.title: Modern E-Portal System
facilities.description: Advanced online platform for grades, assignments, and parent communication

facilities.title: Computer Laboratory
facilities.description: Fully equipped with latest computers and high-speed internet connectivity

facilities.title: Science Laboratory
facilities.description: Well-equipped labs for chemistry, biology, and physics experiments

facilities.title: Digital Library
facilities.description: Extensive collection of books and digital resources for research

facilities.title: Campus-Wide WiFi
facilities.description: High-speed wireless internet access throughout the entire campus

facilities.title: Smart Classrooms
facilities.description: Interactive whiteboards and multimedia systems in every classroom

facilities.title: Security System
facilities.description: 24/7 CCTV monitoring and secure campus environment for student safety

facilities.title: Multi-Purpose Hall
facilities.description: Large auditorium for assemblies, performances, and special events

team.name: Dr. John Doe
team.title: Principal
team.bio: Ed.D in Educational Leadership with over 20 years experience in academic administration and curriculum development.

team.name: Prof. Jane Smith
team.title: Vice Principal
team.bio: M.Ed in Secondary Education with expertise in student affairs, discipline management, and academic counseling.

team.name: Mr. Michael Brown
team.title: Registrar
team.bio: B.A in Business Administration specializing in student records management, enrollment, and academic documentation.

team.name: Dr. Sarah Wilson
team.title: Academic Director
team.bio: Ph.D in Curriculum and Instruction, responsible for academic programs, teacher development, and assessment.

team.name: Mr. Robert Taylor
team.title: Student Affairs Director
team.bio: M.A in Student Personnel Services, overseeing student activities, counseling services, and campus life.

team.name: Ms. Linda Davis
team.title: Finance Director
team.bio: CPA with MBA in Finance, managing school finances, budgeting, tuition, and financial aid programs.
